title: erigeron aristhales
intro: Erigeron aristhales, also known as the aristhales fleabane or aristhales daisy, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron aristhales include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Erigeron aristhales can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
